candidates.name: Kim Reynolds
candidates.notes: Governor since 2017. First woman elected governor of Iowa. Signed fetal heartbeat abortion ban. Signed constitutional carry. Signed school choice (Education Savings Accounts). Signed Religious Freedom Restoration Act at conservative Christian event. Signed anti-CRT legislation. Signed law banning transgender girls from girls' sports. Signed law banning gender-affirming care for minors. Endorsed Trump early. NRA A rated.

profile.education: Iowa State University (BLS: Political Science, Business Management, Communications)
profile.background: Former county treasurer and state senator; served as lieutenant governor before becoming 43rd governor in 2017; first woman to serve as Iowa's governor.

candidates.name: Chuck Grassley
candidates.notes: Senator since 1981. Longest-serving Republican senator in history. Heritage Action 94% current (much higher than 66% lifetime — voting more conservatively in recent years). NRA A+ rated. Former Senate Judiciary Committee Chair. Pro-life. Supports border security. Known for holding town halls in all 99 Iowa counties annually. Active farmer. Famous Twitter presence. Some past compromises on immigration reform lowered lifetime Heritage score.

profile.education: University of Northern Iowa (BA Political Science, MA Political Science)
profile.background: Longest-serving Republican senator. Family farmer. Former Iowa state legislator and U.S. House member. In Senate since 1981. President pro tempore emeritus. Known for whistleblower advocacy.

candidates.name: Joni Ernst
candidates.notes: Senator since 2015. Heritage Action 94% current (major improvement from 63% lifetime). NRA A rated. Iraq War veteran (23 years Army/National Guard, retired Lt. Colonel). First woman to represent Iowa in Congress. Supports border wall. Pro-life. Signed onto Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act. Some immigration wobbles on amnesty question lowered lifetime score. Strong Second Amendment supporter. Known for 'make 'em squeal' campaign slogan.

profile.education: Iowa State University (BA Psychology), Columbus College (MPA)
profile.background: Retired Army National Guard lieutenant colonel with 23 years of service including deployment to Kuwait. Former Iowa State Senator and Montgomery County Auditor.

candidates.name: Pat Grassley
candidates.notes: Senator since 1981. Longest-serving Republican senator in history. Heritage Action 94% current (much higher than 66% lifetime — voting more conservatively in recent years). NRA A+ rated. Former Senate Judiciary Committee Chair. Pro-life. Supports border security. Known for holding town halls in all 99 Iowa counties annually. Active farmer. Famous Twitter presence. Some past compromises on immigration reform lowered lifetime Heritage score. Speaker of the Iowa House — verified via https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Speaker_of_the_Iowa_House_of_Representatives.

profile.education: University of Northern Iowa (BA Political Science, MA Political Science)
profile.background: Longest-serving Republican senator. Family farmer. Former Iowa state legislator and U.S. House member. In Senate since 1981. President pro tempore emeritus. Known for whistleblower advocacy.
